hero.subtitle: Greenspace E-mobility develops high-power charging hubs, electrifies fleets, and delivers cross-border electric highway projects across the Americas — while advising leading industry players in Europe on hardware, strategy, and deployment.
hero.proofLine: 11+ years experience  ·  Multi-market execution  ·  Trucks, fleets & high-power charging

solutions.title: Everything you need to electrify your mobility
solutions.subtitle: From residential charging to high-power public infrastructure, we have the perfect solution for every need.

residential.title: Residential Charging
residential.desc: Smart home chargers with Wi-Fi connectivity, energy management and solar panel compatibility.
residential.detail: The ideal solution to charge your electric vehicle at home. Our wall-mounted AC chargers install in your garage and let you charge overnight, taking advantage of lower electricity rates. Compatible with all EVs on the market and with solar panels to maximize your savings.
features: AC chargers from 7.4 kW to 22 kW

commercial.title: Commercial Charging
commercial.desc: Solutions for businesses, fleets and parking lots with centralized management and integrated billing.
commercial.detail: A complete solution for businesses, hotels, shopping centers and parking lots. We combine AC chargers for extended stays with DC chargers for fast turnarounds, all managed from a centralized platform with automatic billing and consumption reports.
features: AC chargers 7.4 kW to 22 kW for parking
DC chargers from 50 kW to 400 kW for fast charging

public.title: Public DC Charging
public.desc: High-power chargers (50–350 kW) for public access, routes and mobility hubs.
public.detail: High-power public charging infrastructure for national routes, urban centers and mobility hubs. Our DC chargers support multiple connectors and registration-free payment systems, maximizing accessibility for all drivers.
features: Power from 50 kW to 350 kW per port
Rugged design for outdoor heavy use

fleet.title: Fleet Management
fleet.desc: Software and hardware to optimize electric fleet charging, reducing operational costs.
fleet.detail: Manage your entire electric fleet from a single control panel. We optimize charging based on electricity rates, operational shifts and each vehicle's needs to minimize costs and guarantee full fleet availability.
features: DC fast charging for emergency top-ups
Reports by vehicle, driver and route

solar.title: Solar Integration
solar.desc: We combine photovoltaic energy with charging systems to maximize savings and sustainability.
solar.detail: Maximize your solar energy to charge your electric vehicles. Our systems integrate photovoltaic panels, battery storage and smart chargers so you can charge with 100% renewable energy and reduce your electricity bill by up to 70%.

software.title: Digital Platform
software.desc: App and web portal for real-time monitoring, consumption reports and remote charger management.
software.detail: OCPP-compliant charging network management platform. Control, bill and analyze your entire charging infrastructure from a single dashboard, with a driver mobile app and white-label options for operators.

highway.title: Leading 100% Green Cross-Border Transportation
highway.subtitle: $354 billion in annual trade. 6 million truck crossings per year. One corridor. Greenspace is building the charging infrastructure that electrifies the most strategic freight route on the continent — from Monterrey to Dallas.
highway.corridorNote: Source: Laredo-Nuevo Laredo Corridor, 2025. The Laredo crossing handles more US-Mexico freight than any other port of entry — by a wide margin.
highway.feature1Desc: The Laredo crossing alone moves $354B in annual trade — 41% of all US-Mexico land freight, 15,000 trucks per day. Our 15-hub network along Hwy 85 MX and I-35 US places electric Class 8 trucks at the center of the continent's most critical commercial route.
highway.feature2Desc: Engineered for Class 8 trucks and high-utilization fleets. From 0 to 80% in under 20 minutes — designed for the pace of cross-border freight.
highway.feature3Desc: On-site solar generation and battery storage at every Green Hub — 100% clean energy at every stop, fully independent of grid constraints.
highway.feature4Desc: Every stop is a complete service hub — charging, rest, food, and real-time fleet data, purpose-built for dedicated EV truck operators on the corridor.
highway.featuresTitle: Built for the world's most demanding freight route
highway.featuresSubtitle: 15,000 trucks cross the Laredo bridge every day. Every design decision reflects the realities of that volume — power, uptime, and driver experience at scale.
highway.hub1Desc: 400 kW to MCS per port — simultaneous charging for multiple Class 8 trucks, with CCS2 and Megawatt Charging System (MCS) connectors.
highway.hub2Desc: On-site solar generation and battery storage at every hub — zero-emission charging with full grid independence at every stop.
highway.hub3Desc: Lounge areas, climate control, showers, and workspace — designed for the real needs of long-haul truck drivers.
highway.hub4Desc: Integrated food, convenience retail, and logistics services at every Green Hub location along the corridor.
highway.hub5Desc: Real-time fleet dashboards, vehicle health monitoring, driver check-in, and route optimization systems for dedicated EV fleets.
highway.hub6Desc: Seamless connectivity with fleet telematics platforms, enabling live vehicle data, charging history, and operational analytics.
highway.roadmapSubtitle: A four-phase build-out delivering 15 Green Hubs across the route that carries 41% of all US-Mexico land trade — the first fully electrified cross-border freight corridor in North America.
highway.phase1Desc: 5 Green Hubs operational from Monterrey to Dallas via Hwy 85 MX and I-35 US — establishing the first 100% electric cross-border freight route connecting Mexico and the United States.
highway.phase2Desc: 3 additional Green Hubs deployed along the Hwy 85 and I-35 corridor, increasing route density and network redundancy for dedicated EV freight operators.
highway.phase3Desc: 3 further Green Hubs with advanced battery arbitrage capabilities — reducing energy costs and strengthening grid independence across the full corridor.
highway.phase4Desc: Final 4 Green Hubs complete the 15-site network, deploying Megawatt Charging System (MCS) technology to serve the next generation of Class 8 electric trucks at full commercial freight scale.
highway.ctaJoinTitle: The most important freight route on the continent is going electric
highway.ctaJoinDesc: $354 billion in annual trade. 6 million truck crossings. The transition has started — fleet operators, logistics companies, and infrastructure investors: partner with us to lead it.

hub.title: Every stop on the corridor is a Green Hub
hub.subtitle: Strategically placed along Hwy 85 MX and I-35 US — where dedicated EV fleets charge, drivers rest, and operators stay connected.
hub.point1: 400 kW to MCS high-power charging for Class 8 trucks
hub.point2: On-site solar + battery storage — 100% renewable energy at every hub
hub.point3: Full truck driver services: rest areas, showers, food & convenience
hub.point4: Fleet telematics, real-time dashboards, and route optimization

partners.title: Technology from the world's best manufacturers
partners.subtitle: We work with leading e-mobility brands to guarantee world-class quality, warranty and technical support.

models.title: Two operating models. One mission: scale electric mobility.
models.europeDesc: We support CPOs, OEMs, and infrastructure investors with hardware strategy, vendor benchmarking, and market entry execution.
models.americasDesc: We develop, build, and operate EV charging infrastructure — including high-power hubs and cross-border electric highway projects.

whyUs.title: Built different. Proven across markets.
whyUs.reason1Desc: From the Nordics to Latin America and the United States — we deploy where others plan.
whyUs.reason2Desc: We integrate storage, solar, and smart power distribution to deploy where grid capacity is limited.
whyUs.reason3Desc: We don't just build — we ensure utilization through fleet integration and real demand commitments.
whyUs.reason4Desc: Working with leading global hardware providers to deliver best-in-class solutions for every project.

cta.title: Ready to build something real?
cta.subtitle: Whether you're an investor, fleet operator, or municipality — let's talk about what we can build together.

about.heroTitle: Building the infrastructure behind electric mobility at scale
about.p1: Greenspace E-mobility was founded with a clear mission: to accelerate the transition toward electric mobility by developing reliable, high-performance charging infrastructure for fleets, logistics corridors, and commercial operations.
about.p2: What started in Panama has evolved into a multi-market e-mobility platform operating across the Americas and Europe. Today, Greenspace combines more than 11 years of experience in EV charging, fleet electrification, energy systems, and infrastructure deployment — helping companies move from ambition to execution.
about.p3: In the Americas, we develop, build, and operate charging infrastructure — from fleet depots and high-power hubs to cross-border electric highway projects designed for heavy-duty transport. Our focus is practical: real routes, real vehicles, real utilization.
about.p4: In Europe, we support leading industry players through strategic consulting — helping CPOs, OEMs, hardware manufacturers, and infrastructure investors with market entry, hardware positioning, vendor benchmarking, and deployment strategy.
about.missionText: To accelerate the transition toward electric mobility by building and operating the charging infrastructure that enables fleets, logistics operators, businesses, and communities to electrify at scale. We focus on practical deployment — combining high-power charging, smart software, battery storage, solar integration, and operational expertise to make electric mobility reliable, accessible, and economically viable.
about.visionText: To become a reference infrastructure partner for electric mobility across emerging and high-growth markets — connecting cities, ports, warehouses, logistics corridors, and commercial fleets through reliable charging networks. Our long-term vision is to help create a cleaner transport system where electric trucks, fleets, and passenger vehicles can move seamlessly across borders, supported by infrastructure built for performance, uptime, and scale.
about.whatWeSubtitle: From hardware deployment to strategic advisory — we cover the full e-mobility value chain.
about.do1Desc: We develop and deploy high-power EV charging hubs for fleets, warehouses, commercial sites, and logistics corridors.
about.do2Desc: We help companies move from diesel to electric by aligning vehicles, charging infrastructure, operations, energy requirements, and financial strategy.
about.do3Desc: We are building cross-border charging corridors designed to support electric freight movement between key logistics markets.
about.do4Desc: We support CPOs, OEMs, hardware manufacturers, and investors with market entry, technology benchmarking, hardware positioning, and deployment strategy.
about.do5Desc: We combine charging infrastructure with solar energy, battery storage, and smart load management to improve reliability and reduce grid dependency.
about.whyTitle: More than charger installation — infrastructure development, operations, and strategy.
about.whyText: Greenspace is not only a charger installer. We are an infrastructure developer, operator, and strategic partner focused on turning electric mobility into a scalable business reality. We understand the full value chain: hardware, software, grid constraints, fleet operations, site development, project finance, maintenance, and commercial utilization. This allows us to design charging infrastructure that works not only technically, but financially and operationally. Our strength is connecting global technology with local execution — applying Nordic reliability standards to high-growth markets across the Americas.
about.whyPoint2: Technology-agnostic — best hardware for every project
about.whyPoint3: Built for constrained grids with solar + storage integration
about.whyPoint4: Operator-driven model with real fleet utilization commitments
about.boardSubtitle: EV-relevant executive experience across charging infrastructure, cross-border logistics, energy systems, and investment discipline.

board.william: 10+ years in EV charging, energy systems, and fleet electrification. Founder of Greenspace, developing charging hubs and logistics corridors across Panama, Mexico, the U.S., and Norway. Former Senior Charger Hardware Manager at Circle K.
board.mike: 18+ years in logistics, transportation, and supply chain transformation across North and Central America. Expert in Mexico-U.S. cross-border trade and multimodal corridor development. Former Maersk, CEMEX, FEMSA, and Uber Freight.
board.moises: Senior finance leader with 10+ years across Latin America, North America, and the Caribbean. Specialist in FP&A, commercial finance, P&L management, and business transformation.
board.ruben: Energy and digital transformation executive with 15+ years in the Norwegian energy sector. Specialist in electrification and large-scale infrastructure delivery. Former senior leader at Aker Solutions.
board.horacio: Senior strategist with 14+ years leading transport and logistics operations on the Mexico-U.S. border. Expert in binational freight flows and fleet electrification for all fleet sizes.

about.ctaText: Whether you're a fleet operator, investor, logistics company, or site owner — let's talk about what we can build together.

products.title: World-class EV charging hardware

products.autelAc: Residential and commercial chargers from 7.4 kW to 22 kW, with smart connectivity and app control.
products.autelDc: DC fast chargers from 60 kW to 360 kW for public use, fleets, and charging corridors.
products.autelStorage: Battery energy storage systems (BESS) to optimize self-consumption and reduce energy costs.
products.sinexcelDc: High-power DC chargers and precision industrial power conversion systems.
products.sinexcelStorage: High energy density modular BESS for critical infrastructure and grid stabilization.
products.gresgyingAc: Compact and robust AC chargers for residential, hotel, and corporate installations.
products.gresgyingDc: Fast and ultra-fast DC chargers for public hubs and charging corridors.
products.gresgyingStorage: Integrated storage solutions combining solar charging and demand management.
products.sectorsSubtitle: We design the ideal solution based on the type of installation and required charging volume.
products.sectorResidentialDesc: Smart AC home chargers. Install in your garage and charge overnight at reduced rates.
products.sectorCommercialDesc: AC and DC solutions for corporate fleets, employee parking, and distribution centers.
products.sectorFleetDesc: Hardware and software to manage full fleet charging, reducing costs and maximizing availability.
products.sectorSolarDesc: Integrate your photovoltaic system with vehicle charging and storage for total energy independence.
products.includedDesc: We don't just sell hardware. We deliver complete solutions with installation, support and management platform included.
products.platformDesc: Manage your entire charging network, users and payments from our mobile app and OCPP web portal. Compatible with all AC and DC chargers.

platform.metaDesc: Manage your charging infrastructure in real time with our OCPP app and web portal.
platform.heroTitle: Control your charging infrastructure from anywhere
platform.heroSubtitle: Our OCPP platform connects AC and DC chargers, manages users and payments, and displays real-time metrics — all from a mobile app and web portal.
platform.dashboardDesc: View the status of all your charging points, analyze historical consumption, manage customers and generate reports from a single web dashboard.
platform.appTitle: The only app connecting all drivers
platform.appDesc: Drivers can find nearby stations, reserve connectors and pay from their phone. The only app in the region where you can see and access all publicly and semi-publicly installed chargers.
platform.app1: Interactive map with real-time station availability
platform.app2: Start and stop charging sessions from mobile
platform.featTitle: Everything you need in one platform
platform.featSubtitle: Built for operators, fleets and drivers — scalable from 1 charger to thousands.
platform.feat1Desc: View the location and availability of all charging points in real time.
platform.feat2Desc: Start and stop charging sessions remotely from the app or web portal.
platform.feat3Desc: Dashboards with consumption, revenue and performance by station, date and user.
platform.feat4Desc: Automatic per-session billing with support for card, RFID and in-app payments.
platform.feat5Desc: Manage drivers, fleets and access roles from a centralized control panel.
platform.feat6Desc: OCPP 1.6 and 2.0 standard, data encryption and role-based access for maximum security.
